_comment: Golden regression baseline for the TreeMaker model/optimizer port. Consumed by the TS solver regression tests in P2. Regenerate with `npm run oracle`. See README.md for the platform-sensitivity caveat: the ALM optimizer is non-convex, so complex cases drift across compiler/platform while simple cases reproduce to ~6 digits. Compare the Wasm build tolerance-based against THIS machine's native run.

cases.desc: centipede with symmetry constraints, infeasible start
optimized centipede, some nodes unpinned (edge strain max)
scorpion, many path-active + edge-strain constraints, infeasible start
